description_long: This is an adult male figure with a muscular build, standing upright with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. The individual has short hair and is shirtless, revealing a tattoo of a yin-yang symbol on the upper back and another small tattoo on the left upper arm. He is wearing fitted, mid-thigh athletic shorts with a visible waistband and no shirt or upper body clothing. The skin tone is medium to dark, and the body is anatomically proportionate, with defined musculature in the chest, arms, and legs. The feet are bare, and there are no visible accessories or carried objects. The overall appearance suggests a casual, athletic, or fitness-oriented context.
description: A shirtless adult male with short hair, athletic build, tattoos, and fitted shorts, standing in a T-pose. Barefoot and without accessories, the figure has a casual, fitness-oriented appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the muscular chest, abs, face, and both arms extended, with shorts and bare feet visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, arm, torso, and leg, with the left arm tattoo visible.
description_view_2: Back view reveals the yin-yang tattoo on the upper back, the back muscles, and the rear of the shorts and legs.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the profile of the head, arm, torso, and leg, with no visible tattoos on this side.
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
